form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 6 len behind Marines Cry with 59.5kg at $6.50. The start before that rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 9 at this track on March 2 over 1200m, 1.0 len behind Good Vibes with 59kg at $4.20. Plenty to like about her today way back in grade.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 9th of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl1 on February 22 over 1200m, 4 len behind Just Walter John with 57.5kg at $41. Second run from a spell sat behind the speed prior to fading to run last of 7 at this track on March 15 over 1300m, 5.5 len behind Superb Vintage carrying 58kg at $11. Can improve third-up into the campaign.
